case_title: GLODEK, WALDEMAR vs. DONZELLI, PATTI et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GLODEK, WALDEMAR AS TO DEFENDANT DONZELLI, PATTI STREET, BRIAN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-20-2000 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-15-2000 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-02-2000
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR SEP-26-2000 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-06-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON DEC-06-2000, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF IN PRO PER WALDEMAR GLODEK, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-21-2000 CONTINUED FROM DEC-06-2000 TO FEB-21-2001 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-26-2000, OFF CALENDAR SEPT 26,2000 POS OSC.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-20-2000, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF GLODEK WALDEMAR. HEARING SET FOR DEC-06-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
